admin.title: Admin command center
admin.subtitle: Welcome back, {{name}}. Track election operations and handle lifecycle actions quickly from here.

empty.needsAction: No lifecycle action is pending right now.

nextElection.none: No open or upcoming elections were found.

recentVotes.empty: No locally stored ballot receipts yet.

myVotesPage.title: My Votes
myVotesPage.subtitleEmpty: Confirmed election participations and locally saved ballot receipts will appear here.
myVotesPage.subtitleWithRecords: This page shows the elections you have already voted in. Full ballot receipts are available on the browser where the vote was submitted.

state.empty: No vote records were found for this account yet.

messages.loadFailed: Unable to load your vote history right now.
messages.receiptLocalOnly: A vote was recorded for this election, but the full ballot receipt is only available on the browser where the ballot was submitted.

chooseRole.title: Choose how you want to enter
chooseRole.subtitle: Your account has both citizen and admin access. Pick the interface you want to use for this session.

citizen.title: Citizen mode

admin.title: Admin mode
